media-feature-name-disallowed-list.message: Raw @media is banned. Use respond-to()/respond-down()/respond-between() for widths, or the reduce-motion()/color-scheme() mixins for prefers-*. See .context/design/contracts/responsive-contract.md §2, §8, §15.

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: Raw 100vh is banned (ignores mobile browser chrome). Use var(--vh-full). See responsive-contract.md §14.
